tasks.subject: Task 1: RestartCount on ContainerInfo
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Collect container RestartCount for flapping detection.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/collectors/ -run TestDocker -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/dto/docker.go", "daemon/services/collectors/docker.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/collectors/ -run TestDocker -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RestartCount field", "collector populates"]}
```

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/alerting/history.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/alerting/ -run TestMetricsHistory -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bounding+prune", "slope/ETA"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: Deploy to Unraid and verify (no regressions)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Non-destructive deploy + verify on live Unraid; no regressions.

**Verify:** ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ansible failed=0", "4 new collectors running", "new endpoints 200", "network_rx_bytes non-zero"]}
```
